text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Nice! My warm-up exercises went perfectly! Now
I'm feeling pumped!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: All that's left is to win this race.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Brace yourself, okay? I'm going to show you
something real cool!
